title: Book a Lesson
noSlots: No available slots on this date

format.title: Lesson Format
format.noPlatformId: The teacher hasn't set up a {{platform}} ID yet — please pick another platform.
format.scanQrHint: Or scan the QR to add the teacher.
format.noLocations: No locations available. Contact the teacher.
format.customLocationHint: Enter the address or place name you'd like to meet at. The teacher will review before confirming.

notes.label: Notes for teacher
notes.placeholder: What would you like to focus on? Any specific topics or goals?

payment.title: Payment Method
payment.bankInfo: Please transfer to the following account:
payment.bankNote: Please include your booking reference in the transfer description. Your booking will be confirmed once payment is verified.

confirmation.title: Booking Confirmed!
confirmation.subtitle: You will receive a confirmation email shortly.
confirmation.pendingPayment: Your booking is pending payment confirmation.

duration.title: Choose duration
duration.priceHint: Prices shown use the base rate; the chosen teacher's actual rate is applied at checkout.
duration.priceHintNoTeacher: The price is set by each teacher and shown after you choose one.
